name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana - Shishu
description: Small loan support for micro and small businesses like kirana shops, tailors, small workshops and village service providers.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana - Kishor
description: Working capital and term loans for growing small rural businesses, shopkeepers and traders.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Flexible credit line for farmers to buy seeds, fertilizer, and meet other cultivation expenses at lower interest rates.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Term loan for women and SC/ST entrepreneurs starting a small business in manufacturing, trading or services.

name: Self Help Group (SHG) Bank Linkage
description: Low interest loans to women's self help groups for income-generating activities like dairy, stitching, agarbatti and handicrafts.
